institution.en: He's been in an institution since the crash.

plague.en: Ten Biblical plagues over Egypt, ranging from locusts to the death of the crown prince, finally forced Pharaoh to let Moses's people go.

psychological.en: I'm concerned about their psychological well-being.

shade.en: The old oak tree gave shade in the heat of the day.

persistent.en: She has had a persistent cough for weeks.

tolerance.en: Our customers can generally accept ten times the tolerance which we can achieve in our machining operations.

senior.en: He was four years her senior.

contemporary.en: Cervantes was a contemporary of Shakespeare.

content.en: You can't have any more - you'll have to content yourself with what you already have.

overweight.en: Apple common stock is one of our overweights.

mainstream.en: His ideas were well outside the mainstream, but he presented them intelligently, and we were impressed if not convinced.

cheek.en: You’ve got some cheek, asking me for money!

import.en: It was a matter of great import.

fiction.en: I am a great reader of fiction.

upbringing.en: Through her upbringing, Mildred's father had carefully programmed her to expect very little from life.

preserve.en: Every people have the right to preserve its identity and culture.

advocate.en: Since she started working with her advocate, she has become much more confident.

dust.en: to raise, or kick up, a dust

track.en: Can you see any tracks in the snow?

session.en: "Are we having a recording session?" / "Yes. We've even got some session musicians to provide some brass."

exhaust.en: Moisture of the earth is exhausted by evaporation.

praise.en: Be sure to praise Bobby for his excellent work at school this week.

relative.en: Why do my relatives always talk about sex?

breakthrough.en: Albert Einstein is credited with making some of the greatest breakthroughs in modern physics.

scratch.en: Her skin was covered with tiny scratches.

harmful.en: Wear a hat to protect your skin from harmful sunlight.

undergo.en: The project is undergoing great changes.

vital.en: vital energies; vital functions; vital actions

fortunately.en: Fortunately, Sam's pet hamster was not dead.

commencement.en: The time of Henry VII nearly coincides with the commencement of what is termed modern history.

fetch.en: If you put some new tyres on it, and clean it up a bit, the car should fetch about $5,000

clumsy.en: He's very clumsy. I wouldn't trust him with carrying the dishes.

establishment.en: Since their establishment of the company in 1984, they have grown into a global business.

gallery.en: a clip-art gallery in a wordprocessor

desert.en: They were marooned on a desert island in the Pacific.

entitle.en: A passport entitles the bearer to travel to other countries.

relieve.en: I was greatly relieved by the jury's verdict.

colleague.en: Young Fortinbras,/ Holding a weak supposal of our worth/...Colleagued with the dream of his advantage,/...hath not failed to pester us with message/ Importing the surrender of those lands/Lost by his father. - Hamlet (Act I, Scene 2)

undertake.en: I hate people who try and undertake on the motorway.

convenient.en: Fast food might be convenient, but it's also very unhealthy.

column.en: It was too hard to read the text across the whole page, so I split it into two columns.

affectionate.en: She eulogised her always warm and affectionate brother.

regular.en: Bartenders usually know their regulars by name.

hinder.en: A drought hinders the growth of plants.

selection.en: The large number of good candidates made selection difficult.

tide.en: The doctor's no good this tide.

superior.en: Rebecca had always thought shorts were far superior to pants, as they didn't constantly make her legs itch.

grant.en: I got a grant from the government to study archeology in Egypt.

observe.en: From this vantage point we can observe the behavior of the animals in their natural habitat.

institute.en: I work in a medical research institute.

emergency.en: Cardiac arrest is an emergency and if you find someone in cardiac arrest you should call 999 immediately.

stress.en: Go easy on him, he's been under a lot of stress lately.

suppose.en: Suppose that A implies B and B implies C. Then A implies C.

remove.en: He removed the marbles from the bag.

promote.en: He promoted his clerk to office manager.

slave.en: a slave to passion, to strong drink, or to ambition

mature.en: She is quite mature for her age.

threaten.en: He threatened me with a knife.

renew.en: I'd like to renew these three books.  Did you know that you can renew online?

takeoff.en: The flight was smooth, but the takeoff was a little rough.

innocent.en: The slaughter of the innocents was a significant event in the New Testament.

dropout.en: The politicians of the world are mere political university dropouts.

replace.en: When you've finished using the telephone, please replace the handset.

sightseeing.en: Sightseeing is a frequent reason to visit San Francisco.

honor.en: The crowds gave the returning general much honor and praise.

personality.en: The president has a unique personality.

sensitive.en: Max is very sensitive; he cried today because of the bad news.

sway.en: The old song caused a little sway in everyone in the room.

technical.en: The performance showed technical virtuosity, but lacked inspiration.

harm.en: No harm came to my possessions.

contaminate.en: This water is contaminated. It isn't safe to drink.

soar.en: The pump prices soared into new heights as the strike continued.

solely.en: The new chef was solely responsible for attending the grill.

tremendous.en: Van Beethoven's ninth symphony is a tremendous piece of music.

civilization.en: Modern civilization is a product of industrialization and globalization.

tough.en: They were doing fine until they encountered a bunch of toughs from the opposition.

gift.en: She had a gift for playing the flute.

scale.en: Please rate your experience on a scale from 1 to 10.

embrace.en: I wholeheartedly embrace the new legislation.

performance.en: the performance of an undertaking or a duty

violate.en: Accessing unauthorized files violates security protocol.

privacy.en: I need my privacy, so please stay out of my room.

choke.en: Ever since he choked on a bone, he has refused to eat fish.

capable.en: As everyone knew, he was capable of violence when roused.

careless.en: Jessica was so careless that she put her shorts on backwards.

swallow.en: He took the aspirin with a single swallow of water.

distance.en: From Moscow, the distance is relatively short to Saint Petersburg, relatively long to Novosibirsk, but even greater to Vladivostok.

submit.en: They will not submit to the destruction of their rights.

critical.en: A good teacher is fair but critical.

transaction.en: The transaction was made on Friday with the supplier.

via.en: They drove from New York to Los Angeles via Omaha.

insist.en: I insist that my secretary dresses nicely.

philosopher.en: I wanted to become a philosopher.

scholarship.en: Tom was able to go to college thanks to a scholarship.
scholarship.zh: 因為一份獎學金，Tom得以上大學。

ignorance.en: All you need is ignorance and confidence and the success is sure.
ignorance.zh: 要想成功只需要无知和自信。

intelligence.en: To have doubts about oneself is the first sign of intelligence.
intelligence.zh: 自我怀疑是聪明的第一标志。

tiny.en: He came from a tiny mountain town.

cozy.en: He lives in a cozy little house.
cozy.zh: 他住在一個舒適的小房子裡。

clinic.en: She went to the Takasu clinic.

chemical.en: Immediately after it caught fire, the chemical factory blew up.
chemical.zh: 化学工厂一着火就爆炸了。

currently.en: Burj Khalifa is currently the tallest skyscraper in the world.
currently.zh: 目前哈里發塔是世界上最高的摩天大樓。

imitate.en: Parrots can imitate the human voice.

injure.en: You may injure yourself if you don't follow safety procedures.
injure.zh: 如果你不按照安全手续来的话，你可能会受伤的。

consult.en: I don't know who to consult with.
consult.zh: 我不知道该和谁商量好。

plastic.en: A plastic dish will melt on the stove.
plastic.zh: 塑料盘子在烤箱里会化的。

distract.en: The crowd was distracted by a helicopter hovering over the stadium when the only goal of the game was scored.

subdivision.en: Work on one subdivision at a time.

detail.en: Note this fine detail in the lower left corner.

convincing.en: Our convincing evidence was sufficient in the end to win the trial.

donate.en: He donated an etching from his own collection to the new art gallery.

compare.en: Compare the tiger's coloration with that of the zebra.

item.en: Tweezers are great for manipulating small items.

concrete.en: The road was made of concrete that had been poured in large slabs.

govern.en: The old king governed the land wisely.

classify.en: Should we classify "make up" as an idiom or as a phrasal verb?

restrict.en: After suffering diahrroea, the patient was restricted to a diet of rice, cold meat, and yoghurt.

majority.en: The majority agreed that the new proposal was the best.

virtual.en: In fact a defeat on the battlefield, Tet was a virtual victory for the North, owing to its effect on public opinion.

programming.en: The network changed its programming to mess with DVRs again.

coach.en: John flew coach to Vienna, but first-class back home.

crisis.en: In a crisis, you must get in touch with your teacher.
crisis.zh: 在危險的時候你必須跟你的老師聯繫。

interconnect.en: The Internet interconnects a set of networks.

poll.en: The student council had a poll to see what people want served in the cafeteria.

consent.en: After reflecting a little bit, I've consented.

utility.en: I've bought a new disk utility that can recover deleted files.

rank.en: Your gym clothes are rank, bro – when'd you last wash 'em?

inflation.en: The inflation of the balloon took five hours.

secure.en: to secure a creditor against loss; to secure a debt by a mortgage

criticize.en: They criticized him for endangering people's lives.

implementation.en: His implementation works, but it needs some fine-tuning.

enable.en: His parents enabled him to go on buying drugs.

narrow.en: the narrows of New York harbor

shortcut.en: There are shortcuts to some of my favourite applications on my desktop.

leisure.en: She spends her leisure time making dolls.
leisure.zh: 她利用空闲时间做布娃娃。

density.en: The number of particles per unit volume of a specified volume can be considered to be the particle density for the specified volume.

department.en: Technical things are not his department; he's a people person.

desire.en: It is my desire to speak with you.

legend.en: According to the legend on the map, that building is a school.

quit.en: After having to work overtime without being paid, I quit my job.

outgoing.en: Tom is very outgoing and enjoys meeting people; his brother, on the other hand, is painfully shy.

reverse.en: We believed the Chinese weren't ready for us. In fact, the reverse was true.

enroll.en: They were eager to enroll new recruits.

logically.en: An argument may be logically sound without being true.
logically.zh: 不正确的命题听起来可能符合逻辑。

rental.en: It's just a rental, so I don't need to take very good care of it.

component.en: A CPU is a component of a computer.

quotation.en: "Where they burn books, they will also burn people" is a famous quotation from Heinrich Heine.

faith.en: I have faith in the goodness of my fellow man.

invalid.en: This invalid contract cannot be legally enforced.

invade.en: Under some circumstances police are allowed to invade a person's privacy.

separately.en: We've been living separately for three years.

strain.en: There is a strain of madness in her family.

lap.en: The boy was sitting on his mother's lap.

character.en: A single locus governing the petal colour character was detected on the linkage group A2.

avail.en: I tried fixing it, to no avail.  Labor, without economy, is of little avail.

instant.en: She paused for only an instant, which was just enough time for John to change the subject.

democratic.en: The United States is a democratic country, as the citizens are allowed to choose leaders to represent their interests.

barely.en: The plane is so far away now I can barely see it.

vanish.en: a as in ale ordinarily ends with a vanish of i as in ill.

harsh.en: Quit harshing me already, I said that I was sorry!

pregnant.en: I went to the doctor and, guess what, I'm pregnant!

overwhelm.en: The dinghy was overwhelmed by the great wave.

stressful.en: Cities are exciting places, but also stressful.
stressful.zh: 城市是令人興奮的地方，但也會讓人產生壓力。

diplomatic.en: Albania immediately severed diplomatic relations with Zimbabwe.

candidate.en: He was the strongest candidate for the position.
candidate.zh: 他是那个职位最有希望的候选人。

fund.en: a fund for the maintenance of underprivileged students

delight.en: A beautiful landscape delights the eye.

steady.en: Hold the ladder steady while I go up.

identification.en: Much education and experience is required for proper identification of bird species

retirement.en: His life after retirement was unhappy.
retirement.zh: 他退休後的生活不快樂。

commit.en: Tony should be committed to a nuthouse!
